Package com.sap.ai.sdk.foundationmodels.openai

package com.sap.ai.sdk.foundationmodels.openai
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.sap.ai.sdk.foundationmodels.openai.model
     
    com.sap.ai.sdk.foundationmodels.openai.spring
     
  • Class
    Description
    OpenAiAssistantMessage
    Represents a chat message as 'assistant' to OpenAI service.
    OpenAiChatCompletionDelta
    Represents an OpenAI chat completion output delta for streaming.
    OpenAiChatCompletionRequest
    Represents a request for OpenAI chat completion, including conversation messages and parameters.
    OpenAiChatCompletionResponse
    Represents the output of an OpenAI chat completion.
    OpenAiClient
    Client for interacting with OpenAI models.
    OpenAiClientException
    Generic exception for errors occurring when using OpenAI foundation models.
    OpenAiContentItem
    Represents an item in a OpenAiMessageContent object.
    OpenAiEmbeddingRequest
    Represents a request to create embeddings using OpenAI's API.
    OpenAiEmbeddingResponse
    Represents a response from the OpenAI Embedding API.
    OpenAiError
    Represents an error response from the OpenAI API.
    OpenAiFunctionCall
    Represents a function type tool called by an OpenAI model.
    OpenAiImageItem
    Represents an image item in a OpenAiMessageContent object.
    OpenAiImageItem.DetailLevel
    The detail level of the image.
    OpenAiMessage
    Interface representing convenience wrappers of chat message to the openai service.
    OpenAiMessageContent
    Represents the content of a chat message.
    OpenAiModel
    OpenAI models that are available in AI Core.
    OpenAiSystemMessage
    Represents a chat message as 'system' to OpenAI service.
    OpenAiTextItem
    Represents a text item in a OpenAiMessageContent object.
    OpenAiTool
    Represents an OpenAI tool that can be used to define a function call in an OpenAI Chat Completion request.
    OpenAiTool.Builder1<InputT>
    Creates a new OpenAiTool instance with the specified function and input class.
    OpenAiTool.Builder2
    Creates a new OpenAiTool instance with the specified name.
    OpenAiToolCall
    Represents a tool called by an OpenAI model.
    OpenAiToolChoice
    OpenAi ToolChoice to specify whether to call which tool.
    OpenAiToolMessage
    Represents a tool message in the OpenAI service.
    OpenAiUserMessage
    Represents a chat message as 'user' to OpenAI service.
